description: Proves the Planner/Critic governed tool loop, tool registry, trace visualization, human escalation gate, evidence validation layer, and multi-language runtime profiles.
preconditions: Dogfood memory index exists for IronDev.

steps.description: Run the governed Planner/Critic tool loop campaign.

boundary: 162-167 proves governed tool-using reasoning, trace output, human escalation, evidence validation, and runtime profiles. It does not grant writes, memory mutation, ticket creation, patch apply, raw command execution by agents, or self-approval.
